title: scope tinybird tokens to minimum permissions
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tidying the token drawer
gist.blurb: We've tightened up our internal security by scoping our analytics tokens to minimum permissions. Just doing some routine housekeeping to keep the hive safe and tidy!
gist.summary: Replaced admin-level Tinybird tokens with scoped, append-only tokens across all environments and removed unused secrets.
gist.impact: Improves internal security by adhering to the principle of least privilege for analytics data ingestion.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot organizing glowing keys or locking a small, cozy safe. A tiny bird (representing Tinybird) could be present. The robot companion helping sort files or keys.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing glowing pastel keys into a small wooden safe. A tiny blue bird sits on top of the safe. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and secure.
